achievements.title: Rapid MVP delivery
achievements.description: Known for moving quickly from concept to working system, especially in AI product and workflow contexts.

achievements.title: Applied AI product design
achievements.description: Builds products where AI is part of a system, not just a layer of generated text.

achievements.description: Has built and designed multiple concepts around role matching, candidate fit, recruiter workflows, and structured evaluation.

achievements.title: Digital Marketing Award Winner - The Pitch UK 2015
achievements.description: He created a successful digital marketing campaign that won the prestigious The Pitch UK 2015 award.
